summary: Clean pass. The feature adds is_idle: bool to PerCoreState (initialized false at line 47), sets it true on idle thread fallback (line 410), and sets it false on both non-idle paths — ready queue selection (line 380) and current-thread-continues (line 391). All three write sites are inside schedule_inner which takes &mut State, and every caller acquires STATE.lock() before calling, confirming all writes are under the lock. No control flow or behavioral change — pure bookkeeping. 7 new tests plus updates to the existing randomized state machine (invariant 6 in check_invariants) and rapid_block_wake test provide thorough coverage of initialization, transitions, per-core independence, and randomized consistency. Doc comment on the field explains Phase 3 IPI purpose. Code follows project conventions (co-located types+impls, dependency order, rustfmt).
